title: The Link holdings (1996-1997, 2005-2006, 2008)
description: Bundle label for The Link holdings covering selected runs from 1996-1997, 2005-2006, and 2008.
significance: Represents local newspaper and periodical holdings that document civic and community life in Jackson.
notes: Source image: 1.png. Label transcription: THE LINK / Jan. 1996-Sept. 1997 / Jan. 2005-March 2006 / Oct. 2008.

title: The Jackson Advocate holdings (March-December 2006)
description: Bundle label for The Jackson Advocate holdings covering March through December 2006.
significance: Documents one year of The Jackson Advocate, an important newspaper source for Black public life and local reporting.
notes: Source image: 2.png. Label transcription: THE JACKSON ADVOCATE / March 2006-Dec 2006.

title: The Jackson Advocate holdings (January-December 2007)
description: Bundle label for The Jackson Advocate holdings for calendar year 2007.
significance: Supports research into local Black press coverage in Jackson during 2007.
notes: Source image: 3.png. Label transcription: THE JACKSON ADVOCATE / Jan-Dec. 2007.

title: The Jackson Advocate holdings (January-December 2010)
description: Bundle label for The Jackson Advocate holdings for calendar year 2010.
significance: Captures a full year of The Jackson Advocate for collections research and public history use.
notes: Source image: 4.png. Label transcription: THE JACKSON ADVOCATE / Jan-Dec. 2010.

title: The Jackson Advocate holdings (January-December 2009)
description: Bundle label for The Jackson Advocate holdings for calendar year 2009.
significance: Extends the museum's run of The Jackson Advocate into the late 2000s.
notes: Source image: 5.png. Label transcription: THE JACKSON ADVOCATE / Jan-Dec. 2009.

title: The Jackson Advocate holdings (August-October 2011)
description: Bundle label for The Jackson Advocate holdings from August through October 2011.
significance: Documents a partial 2011 run of The Jackson Advocate within the museum's newspaper holdings.
notes: Source image: 6.png. Label transcription: Jackson Advocate / August 2011 thru October 2011 / Add to 2011's.

title: The Jackson Advocate holdings (May-October 2012)
description: Bundle label for The Jackson Advocate holdings from May through October 2012.
significance: Adds a partial 2012 run of The Jackson Advocate to the museum's holdings inventory.
notes: Source image: 7.png. Label transcription: Jackson Advocate / May 2012 thru October 2012 / Add to other 2012's.

title: Jackson Free Press holdings (2010 and September 2011 selections)
description: Bundle label for Jackson Free Press holdings covering most of 2010 and three weekly September 2011 issues.
significance: Represents independent local press holdings that document contemporary Jackson civic and cultural life.
notes: Source image: 8.png. Label transcription: Jackson Free Press / Jan-Sept 2010 / Aug 31-Sept 6 2011 / Sept 7-13 2011 / Sept 14-20 2011.

title: Jackson Free Press holdings (January-December 2009)
description: Bundle label for Jackson Free Press holdings for calendar year 2009.
significance: Preserves a full-year run of Jackson Free Press for research into local independent journalism.
notes: Source image: 9.png. Label transcription: Jackson Free Press / Jan-Dec 2009.

title: Jackson Free Press holdings (January-December 2013)
description: Bundle label for Jackson Free Press holdings for calendar year 2013.
significance: Adds a later complete run of Jackson Free Press to the holdings list.
notes: Source image: 10.png. Label transcription: Jackson Free Press / Jan 2013 / December 2013.

title: The Jackson Advocate holdings (January-December 2012, incomplete)
description: Bundle label for The Jackson Advocate holdings for 2012 with missing June, July, and August issues noted.
significance: Documents an incomplete but substantial 2012 run of The Jackson Advocate.
notes: Source image: 11.png. Label transcription: THE JACKSON ADVOCATE / Jan-Dec 2012 / Missing issues June, July, August.

title: The Jackson Advocate holdings (January-December 2011, incomplete)
description: Bundle label for The Jackson Advocate holdings for 2011 with the September issue noted as missing.
significance: Captures an incomplete 2011 run of The Jackson Advocate within the museum holdings.
notes: Source image: 12.png. Label transcription: THE JACKSON ADVOCATE / Jan.-Dec. 2011 / Sept. issue missing.

title: The Jackson Advocate holdings (January-December 2008)
description: Bundle label for The Jackson Advocate holdings for calendar year 2008.
significance: Extends the museum's run of The Jackson Advocate through 2008.
notes: Source image: 13.png. Label transcription: THE JACKSON ADVOCATE / Jan-Dec. 2008.

title: Mixed periodicals folder (Close Up, Focus, National Alliance, Burning Spear, Planet, Northeast Ledger, South Reporter)
description: Mixed folder label for multiple newspaper and periodical titles spanning 1968 through 2007.
significance: Represents a cross-title reference grouping of scattered newspaper and periodical issues.
notes: Source image: 14.png. Label transcription: Close Up - 1968, 1969; Focus 1997; National Alliance - 1984; Burning Spear - 1984; Planet - August 2002; Northeast Ledger - March 29, 2006 and April 15, 2006; South Reporter - May 24, 2007.

title: The Clarion-Ledger election-related issues (1989-2011 selections)
description: Mixed-date Clarion-Ledger folder including issues associated with the election of Barack Obama as 44th president.
significance: Useful for tracing mainstream newspaper coverage across selected dates, especially around the Obama election context noted on the label.
notes: Source image: 15.png. Label transcription: The Clarion Ledger / December 9, 2000 / February 5, 1989 / November 10, 2005 / January 23, 2006 / June 23, 2006 / September 13, 2006 / October 13, 2006 / Nov. 3, 2008 / Nov. 8, 2008 / May 8, 2009 / May 20, 2009 / Jan. 21, 2009 / April 6, 2010 / April 14, 2011 / Papers with the election of Barack Obama 44th President.

title: Jackson Free Press holdings (January 4-October 18, 2006)
description: Bundle label for Jackson Free Press holdings spanning January 4 through October 18, 2006.
significance: Documents a sustained run of Jackson Free Press during 2006.
notes: Source image: 16.png. Label transcription: Jackson Free Press / Jan 4, 2006 thru October 18, 2006.

title: Jackson Free Press holdings (May-December 2008 selections)
description: Bundle label for multiple Jackson Free Press issues from May through December 2008.
significance: Captures a set of weekly issues from late 2008 for local journalism and public life research.
notes: Source image: 17.png. Label transcription: Jackson Free Press / May 22-28, 2008 / May 29-June 4, 2008 / July 31-Aug 2008 / Aug 14-20 2008 / Sept 11-17, 2008 / Sept 25-Oct 1, 2008 / Oct 16-22, 2008 / Oct 30-Nov 5, 2008 / Oct 23-29, 2008 / Dec 18-24, 2008.

title: Jackson Free Press holdings (2003, 2005, 2007 selections)
description: Mixed-date Jackson Free Press folder containing selected issues from 2003, 2005, and 2007.
significance: Provides a cross-year sampling of Jackson Free Press coverage.
notes: Source image: 18.png. Label transcription: Jackson Free Press / Nov 27-Dec 10, 2003 / Sept 29-Oct 5, 2005 / Feb 1-7, 2007 / June 2007 / Sept 20-26, 2007 / Sept 27-10/3, 2007 / Nov 1-7, 2007.

title: Jackson Free Press holdings (January-December 2014)
description: Bundle label for Jackson Free Press holdings for calendar year 2014.
significance: Extends the Jackson Free Press run into 2014.
notes: Source image: 19.png. Label transcription: Jackson Free Press / Jan-December 2014.

title: Mixed periodicals folder (Jackson Free Press, Miss Link, Close Up)
description: Mixed folder label combining scattered Jackson Free Press dates with Miss Link and Close Up references.
significance: Represents a mixed holding that likely needs later separation into title-specific records once the folder is processed more fully.
notes: Source image: 20.png. Label transcription: Jackson Free Press / Sept 22, 2000 / Nov 7, 2002 / June 12-25, 2005 / Feb 24-March 16, 2005 / June 23-29, 2005 / Sept 29-Oct 5, 2005 / Nov 3-Nov 23, 2005 / Dec 1-7, 2005 / Dec 22-28, 2005 / Dec 15-21, 2005 / Miss Link / Jan 25-31, 1996 / Aug 21-27, 1997 / Close Up - Jan. 1969.
